description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes before_script: bundle install --binstubs, then script: bundle exec asciidoctor-revealjs README.adoc -D public, and after_script: cp -R ./css ./public ||true, cp -R ./demos ./public ||true, cp -R ./Images ./public ||true, mv public/README.html public/index.html. Publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact and configure the job to run only on the master branch. This job will generate a GitLab Pages site from the Asciidoctor Reveal.js output.
